info.name: GoMobility — Passenger App
info.description:
Passenger app ke saare REST APIs (verified against actual backend routes on 2026-04-25).

## Setup
1. Collection variables tab kholo aur `baseUrl` set karo (e.g. `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`).
2. `Auth → Verify Signin (Login)` chalao — accessToken & refreshToken auto-save ho jaayenge collection variables mein.
3. Baaki saare 🔒 requests automatically `Bearer {{accessToken}}` use karenge.

## Important corrections vs old doc (PASSENGER_API.md)
- ❌ `/auth/send-otp` / `/auth/verify-otp` — exist nahi karte. Use `/auth/signin` aur `/auth/verify-signin`.
- ✅ OTP **6 digits** hai (4 nahi).
- ✅ Wallet add money ke do tareeke hain — `/users/wallet/add` (simple) ya `/wallet/recharge` (full payment-order flow).
- ✅ Subscription mein `auto-renew`, `history`, single plan detail bhi hai.
- ✅ Coupons mein `apply` endpoint bhi hai (sirf available list nahi).
- ✅ Payments mein saved methods CRUD bhi hai.

## Response shape (sab endpoints)
```json
// Success
{ "success": true, "message": "...", "data": { ... } }
// Error
{ "success": false, "message": "Error description" }
```

## Socket events
Postman se socket.io test nahi hota. Last folder `🔌 Socket Events (Reference)` mein client ke saare events documented hain — frontend ko reference ke liye.

item.name: 🔐 Auth
item.description: OTP-based signup/signin. OTP **6 digits** hai. SMS provider `ENV.SMS_PROVIDER` se control hota hai (dev mein `console` — OTP terminal mein print hota hai).

request.description:
Naya user register karte time OTP bhejta hai.

**Body fields**
- `phone` (required): 10-digit Indian (`^[6-9]\d{9}$`)
- `role` (required): `passenger` | `driver` | `admin`
- `fullName` (optional): 2-100 chars
- `email` (optional): valid email

**Response**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "OTP sent successfully", "data": { "message": "OTP sent to your phone", "expiryInMinutes": 5 } }
```

**Frontend kya kare**: OTP screen pe le jao, 6-digit input dikhao, 5 min ka countdown chalao.

Existing user ke liye login OTP bhejta hai.

**Body fields**
- `phone` OR `email` (kam se kam ek required)
- `role` (required): `passenger` | `driver` | `admin`

**Response**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "OTP sent successfully", "data": { "message": "OTP sent", "expiryInMinutes": 5 } }
```

⚠️ Yeh wahi endpoint hai jo old doc mein `/auth/send-otp` likha tha — actually `/auth/signin` hai.

exec: // Auto-save tokens for the rest of the collection
console.log('✅ Tokens saved to collection variables');

request.description:
Access token expire hone par naya pair leta hai.

**Frontend strategy**: Jab koi protected API `401` de, refresh-token call karo, naya `accessToken` save karo, original request retry karo. Agar yeh bhi `401` de — user ko login screen pe bhejo.

**Response**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "Token refreshed successfully", "data": { "accessToken": "...", "refreshToken": "..." } }
```
Session delete karta hai aur access token blacklist (24h) karta hai. Frontend ko local tokens bhi clear karne hain.
Current logged-in user ki info — token valid hai ya nahi check karne ke liye useful (app start pe).

Login ke turant baad call karo. Iske bina push notifications nahi aayengi.

**Response**: `{ success: true, message: 'FCM token saved successfully' }`

query.description: bike | auto | car (optional — sab vehicle types if omitted)

request.description:
5 km radius mein available drivers — Redis cache se fast.

**Response**
```json
{ "success": true, "data": { "count": 4, "drivers": [ { "driverId": 7, "latitude": 28.612, "longitude": 77.205, "vehicleType": "auto", "distance": 0.45 } ] } }
```

**Frontend**: Map pe markers drop karo. Polling mat karo — Redis fresh data deta hai but har 10-15s ka throttle rakho.

Header avatar/name, settings screen ke liye.

**Response data**: `{ id, fullName, phone, email, profilePicture, walletBalance?, createdAt }`

Pickup/drop sheet mein quick chips — Home, Work, Other.

**Response data**: `[{ id, label, address, latitude, longitude }]`. Label commonly: `Home` | `Work` | custom string.

Past completed rides ke unique drop locations. Search sheet mein 'Recent' section ke liye.

**Response data**: `[{ address, latitude, longitude, lastUsedAt }]`

Bell icon badge ke liye.

**Response data**: `{ unreadCount: 3 }`

Vehicle selection screen — saare types ka fare ek saath.

**Response data**
```json
{
  "distance_km": 12.3,
  "duration_min": 28,
  "estimates": [
    { "vehicleType": "bike",     "baseFare": 30, "totalFare": 95, "surge": 1.0, "eta": 3 },
    { "vehicleType": "auto",     "baseFare": 40, "totalFare": 145, "surge": 1.2, "eta": 5 },
    { "vehicleType": "economy",  "baseFare": 60, "totalFare": 230, "surge": 1.0, "eta": 4 },
    { "vehicleType": "xl",       "baseFare": 100, "totalFare": 380, "surge": 1.0, "eta": 7 },
    { "vehicleType": "executive", "baseFare": 150, "totalFare": 520, "surge": 1.0, "eta": 9 }
  ]
}
```

**Frontend**: Surge `>1.0` aaye to red badge dikhao.
Sirf ek vehicle type ka fare. Most apps `all-estimates` use karte hain — yeh sirf detail page ke liye.
Sirf surge multiplier — agar app-level 'surge in your area' banner dikhana ho.

Apply Coupon screen mein dikhane ke liye list.

**Response data**: `[{ code, title, description, discountType: 'flat'|'percent', discountValue, minOrderAmount, maxDiscount, expiresAt }]`

User code type karke 'Apply' dabaye to is endpoint se validate karo. Discount preview yahan se aata hai.

**Response data**: `{ valid: true, discount: 46, finalFare: 184, message: 'Coupon applied' }` ya error if invalid.

body.raw:
{
  "pickupLatitude": 28.61,
  "pickupLongitude": 77.20,
  "pickupAddress": "123 MG Road, Bangalore",
  "dropoffLatitude": 28.70,
  "dropoffLongitude": 77.10,
  "dropoffAddress": "MG Road Metro Station",
  "vehicleType": "auto",
  "paymentMethod": "upi",
  "couponCode": "SAVE20"
}

request.description:
Confirm Ride button.

**vehicleType options**: `bike` | `auto` | `economy` | `xl` | `executive`
**paymentMethod options**: `cash` | `wallet` | `upi` | `card`

**Response (201)**
```json
{ "success": true, "message": "Ride requested successfully", "data": { "ride": { "id": 42, "status": "searching", ... }, "fare": { ... } } }
```

**Frontend kya kare**:
1. `rideId` save karo.
2. Socket pe `ride:join` emit karo: `{ rideId }`.
3. Searching screen dikhao + listen karo: `ride:driver_assigned` (mil gaya), `ride:no_driver_found` (timeout).
`scheduledAt` ISO-8601 UTC timestamp hona chahiye, future date.
Upcoming scheduled rides list.

App reopen hone par bottom-sheet restore ke liye. Agar koi active ride nahi to `data: null`.

Status `driver_assigned` ya `driver_arrived` mein passenger ko `otp` field bhi milta hai.

Driver info, vehicle, pickup/drop, fare, status, OTP (jab applicable).

**Status flow**: `searching` → `driver_assigned` → `driver_arrived` → `in_progress` → `completed` (ya `cancelled`).

**Frontend**: OTP sirf passenger ko driver-arrived screen pe dikhao — driver iss OTP ko apni app mein enter karega.

Driver arrive hone tak cancel ho sakta hai. Late cancel pe cancellation fee lag sakta hai (response mein `cancellationFee` field).

**reason options (suggest UI)**: `changed_mind` | `driver_late` | `wrong_pickup` | `safety_concern` | `other`

Receipt screen.

**Response data**
```json
{
  "rideId": 42,
  "baseFare": 40,
  "distanceFare": 80,
  "timeFare": 25,
  "convenienceFee": 10,
  "surgeMultiplier": 1.2,
  "couponDiscount": 30,
  "subscriptionDiscount": 10,
  "taxes": 8,
  "total": 123,
  "paymentMethod": "upi",
  "paymentStatus": "paid"
}
```
Sirf ride complete hone ke baad. `rating` 1-5. Tags ke liye `/reviews/tags` use karke chips dikhao + alag se `/reviews` POST kar sakte ho richer review ke liye.

Past rides — paginated.

**Frontend**: Infinite scroll ya pagination — `meta: { totalPages, currentPage }` use karo.

Emergency contacts ko SMS + admin ko notify karta hai.

**Response data**: `{ alertId, status: 'active', ... }`. UI mein big red banner + `Cancel SOS` button dikhao.
Alert ko `false_alarm` mark karta hai. Trigger ke 30 sec baad confirmation modal: 'Cancel if false alarm'.
Past SOS triggers — settings/safety screen mein.

Today / Yesterday / Earlier groups mein sorted.

**Response data**: `{ groups: { today: [...], yesterday: [...], earlier: [...] } }` — har item: `{ id, title, body, isRead, createdAt, type }`.
User ne notification tap kiya — yeh hit karo.

Step 1 — payment order create karta hai.

**purpose options**: `ride` | `wallet_recharge` | `subscription`
**paymentMethod**: `cash` | `wallet` | `upi` | `card`

**Response**
- `cash` ya `wallet` → auto-confirmed, `paymentStatus: 'paid'`
- `upi` / `card` → `gateway_order_id` milta hai. Razorpay SDK isko use karke checkout open karega.
Step 2 — Razorpay SDK success callback se yeh 3 fields aate hain. Backend signature verify karke payment confirm karta hai. Bina iske payment incomplete rahega.
Order + linked refunds (agar ho).
Saved cards / UPI IDs (gateway tokens — raw card data backend pe nahi).
Card ke liye gateway token bhejo (Razorpay tokenization se), UPI ke liye `vpa`.
Wallet screen ka main payload — balance + recent txns.
Light call — sirf `{ balance: 250 }`. Header chip ke liye.

Simple add money — Min ₹10, Max ₹10,000.

**Note**: Production flow ke liye `/wallet/recharge` better — wo full payment-order create karta hai.
Recharge intent banata hai → `gateway_order_id` deta hai → Razorpay SDK open → success pe `/payments/verify` call karo.
Wallet se ride payment debit. Insufficient balance → 400.
Auth ki zarurat nahi. Pricing/landing page pe.

Current plan, valid till, rides used this month, total saved.

If no active sub: `data: null`.
Rate-limited: 3 per hour. UPI/card → gateway flow same as rides.
Settings page ka toggle.

multipart/form-data — `Content-Type` Postman khud set karega.

**Response data**: `{ profilePicture: 'https://...' }` — frontend updated URL use kare.
`label` typical: `Home`, `Work`, ya custom.
Phone same Indian regex (`^[6-9]\d{9}$`). SOS trigger pe in contacts ko SMS jaayega.
Share screen ke liye apna code + share message.
Onboarding ya 'Got a referral?' screen. Sirf naye user pehli baar apply kar sakte hain.
List of friends jinko refer kiya + earned bonus.

Soft delete — phone/email pe `-deleted-<userId>` suffix lag jaata hai. Active ride chal rahi ho to error.

**Frontend**: Confirmation modal + 'final delete' alert. Local tokens clear karo.
Trip Issues / Payments & Refunds / Account & Subscription — har ek ke andar sub-items ke saath.
**category options**: `trip_issues` | `payments_refunds` | `account_subscription` | `safety` | `other` (categories endpoint se latest list lo).
Full thread chat-style display ke liye.
Rating screen ke chips: Cleanliness, AC Working, Professional, etc.
Tags-wala richer review. Quick rating ke liye `/rides/:id/rate` use kar sakte ho.
Abuse report — moderation queue mein bhejta hai.

item.name: 🔌 Socket Events (Reference)
item.description: Postman se socket.io test nahi hota — yeh sirf reference. Frontend ko ye events implement karne hain.

request.description:
## Connection setup

```js
const socket = io('http://localhost:3000', {
  auth: { token: accessToken },  // optional
  transports: ['websocket']
});
```

## Step 1 — Identify yourself
```js
socket.emit('auth:login', { userId, userType: 'passenger' });
```

## Step 2 — Ride request ke baad room join
```js
socket.emit('ride:join', { rideId });
// ⚠️ Bina iske live tracking nahi milegi
```

## Server → App events (passenger ko sun ne hain)
| Event | Payload | Kab aata hai |
|---|---|---|
| `ride:driver_assigned` | `{ driverName, phone, vehicleNumber, vehicleModel, vehicleColor, rating, eta }` | Driver mil gaya |
| `ride:no_driver_found` | `{ rideId, message }` | Timeout — koi nahi mila |
| `driver:map_ping` | `{ latitude, longitude, timestamp }` | Live driver location (har 3-5s) |
| `ride:eta_update` | `{ etaMinutes, distanceKm, etaType, message }` | `etaType` = `pickup` (driver aa raha) ya `dropoff` (destination tak) |
| `ride:status_changed` | `{ rideId, status }` | `driver_arrived` / `in_progress` / `completed` / `cancelled` |
| `ride:otp_verified` | `{ rideId, verifiedAt }` | Driver ne OTP verify kiya — 'in_progress' screen |
| `chat:new_message` | `{ senderId, senderType, message, timestamp }` | Driver ne chat bheja |
| `chat:user_typing` | `{ userType }` | Typing indicator |

## App → Server events (passenger emit karega)
| Event | Payload |
|---|---|
| `auth:login` | `{ userId, userType: 'passenger' }` |
| `auth:reconnect` | `{ userId }` (app restart pe) |
| `ride:join` | `{ rideId }` |
| `ride:leave` | `{ rideId }` (cancel/complete pe) |
| `chat:send` | `{ rideId, message }` |
| `chat:typing` | `{ rideId }` |

## Reconnection
App wapas khulne pe `auth:reconnect` emit karo — backend Redis se queued messages flush karega aur ride rooms wapas join kara dega.
